---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for AgentHive
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. Include details about the expected behavior and any UI/UX considerations.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why the proposed solution is preferable.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
